narrative:
Precinct Orange V (precinct in Delaware County) has 837 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
